title: greemotion Outdoor Flower Pots Fiona - Flower Pot - Plastic Flower Pots - Round Garden Pots 40 cm - Garden Planters - Medium Size Plant Pot in Taupe
features: Compliment your indoor or outdoor plants, shrubs or flowers with this decorative round plastic plant pot in taupe
The round flower pot is suitable for outside or inside use — it is equipped with drain holes at the bottom for water discharge and soil ventilation
Coated in a neutral yet stylish brown colour, the heavy-duty plastic pot is both UV-Resistant and frost-proof, making it perfect for plant protection when placed outdoors
The medium flower pot has a volume capacity of up to 18 litres and is approximately 40 x 26 cm
Pair this practical and fashionable plastic flower pot with a matching saucer of approximately 39 cm also available from greemotion
description: Product Description "Fiona" Taupe Flower Pot - Indoor Flower Pot - Garden Pots and Planters Whether used indoors or outdoors, this garden pot is not only suitable for outside extremities but is equally suitable to be placed inside the home for a decorative accent to houseplants or flowers. Built in holes at the bottom of the pot allow for proper ventilation and drainage that is essential to the health of any plant — a saucer of 39 cm can be purchased for underneath the pot if used indoors, that way the water discharge is cleanly collected. The plastic pot is coated in a natural taupe colour and is both frost-proof and UV resistant, designed to protect the plant no matter where it is placed. With 18 litres volume capacity and shaped approximately 40 x 26 cm, the plant pot is the perfect size for inside on a window sill, placed as a centre piece on a table or outside alongside the garden furniture on the balcony or patio. Box Contains 1 x flowerpot
